japanese: 俺を誰だと思ってやがる!
romaji: Ore o dare da to omotte yagaru!
english: Who the hell do you think I am!

japanese: オレ様の美技にブギウギ
romaji: Ore-sama no bigi ni bugiugi
english: Dance to my beautiful technique! (alt wording 23)

japanese: 次にお前は「やれやれだぜ」と言う！
romaji: Tsugi ni omae wa 'yare yare da ze' to iu!
english: Next you'll say, 'Good grief!' (alt wording 10)

japanese: やれやれだぜ
romaji: Yare yare da ze
english: Good grief. (alt wording 6) (alt wording 58)

japanese: 次にお前は「やれやれだぜ」と言う！
romaji: Tsugi ni omae wa 'yare yare da ze' to iu!
english: Next you'll say, 'Good grief!' (alt wording 10)

japanese: やれやれだぜ…まったく。
romaji: Yare yare da ze... mattaku.
english: Good grief... honestly. (alt wording 15)

japanese: イエス！イエス！イエス！イエス！
romaji: Iesu! Iesu! Iesu! Iesu!
english: Yes! Yes! Yes! Yes! (alt wording 2)

japanese: 俺を誰だと思ってやがる!
romaji: Ore o dare da to omotte yagaru!
english: Who the hell do you think I am! (alt wording 46)

japanese: オラに元気を分けてくれ!
romaji: Ora ni genki o wakete kure!
english: Lend me your energy!

japanese: 海賊王に、俺はなる！
romaji: Kaizoku ou ni, ore wa naru!
english: I'm gonna be the King of the Pirates!

japanese: おれは人間を超越する！
romaji: Ore wa ningen o chouetsu suru!
english: I will transcend humanity! (alt wording 14)

japanese: 諦めないってばよ!
romaji: Akiramenai tte bayo!
english: I never give up, believe it!

japanese: だが…それがいい。
romaji: Daga... sore ga ii.
english: But... that's what I like. (alt wording 16)
anime: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Diamond is Unbreakable

japanese: やれやれだぜ
romaji: Yare yare da ze
english: Good grief. (alt wording 6)

japanese: 今日の俺は一味違うぜ！
romaji: Kyou no ore wa hitomi chigau ze!
english: I'm on a different level today! (alt wording 13)
anime: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Diamond is Unbreakable

japanese: まだだ、まだ終わらんよ！
romaji: Mada da, mada owaran yo!
english: Not yet! It's not over yet! (alt wording 22) (alt wording 74)

japanese: オラに元気を分けてくれ!
romaji: Ora ni genki o wakete kure!
english: Lend me your energy!

japanese: 海賊王に、俺はなる！
romaji: Kaizoku ou ni, ore wa naru!
english: I'm gonna be the King of the Pirates!

japanese: おれは人間を超越する！
romaji: Ore wa ningen o chouetsu suru!
english: I will transcend humanity! (alt wording 14)

japanese: 諦めないってばよ!
romaji: Akiramenai tte bayo!
english: I never give up, believe it!

japanese: だが…それがいい。
romaji: Daga... sore ga ii.
english: But... that's what I like. (alt wording 16)
anime: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Diamond is Unbreakable

japanese: やれやれだぜ
romaji: Yare yare da ze
english: Good grief. (alt wording 6)

japanese: 今日の俺は一味違うぜ！
romaji: Kyou no ore wa hitomi chigau ze!
english: I'm on a different level today! (alt wording 13)
anime: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Diamond is Unbreakable

japanese: おまえはもう死んでいる
romaji: Omae wa mou shindeiru
english: You're already dead. (alt wording 18)

japanese: 駆逐してやる!この世から一匹残らず!
romaji: Kuchiku shite yaru! Kono yo kara ippiki nokorazu!
english: I'll exterminate them! Every last one from this world! (alt wording 36)

japanese: あきらめたらそこで試合終了ですよ…？
romaji: Akirametara soko de shiai shuuryou desu yo...?
english: If you give up, that's the end of the game.

japanese: 仲間を信じることが俺の魔法だ
romaji: Nakama o shinjiru koto ga ore no mahou da
english: Believing in my friends is my magic.

japanese: 貴様ッ！見ているなッ！！
romaji: Kisama! Mite iru na!!
english: You! You're watching me! (alt wording 11)

japanese: ほう…向かってくるのか
romaji: Ho... mukatte kuru no ka
english: Oh? You're approaching me? (alt wording 3)

japanese: 何ッ！？
romaji: Nani!?
english: What?! (alt wording 19) (alt wording 71)

japanese: 次にお前は「やれやれだぜ」と言う！
romaji: Tsugi ni omae wa 'yare yare da ze' to iu!
english: Next you'll say, 'Good grief!' (alt wording 10)

japanese: 僕は新世界の神となる
romaji: Boku wa shin sekai no kami to naru
english: I will become the god of the new world.

japanese: 笑えばいいと思うよ
romaji: Waraeba ii to omou yo
english: I think you should just laugh.

japanese: 痛みを伴わない教訓には意味がない
romaji: Itami o tomonawanai kyoukun ni wa imi ga nai
english: A lesson without pain is meaningless.

japanese: 仲間を大切にしない奴はそれ以上のクズだ
romaji: Nakama o taisetsu ni shinai yatsu wa sore ijou no kuzu da
english: Those who don't take care of their comrades are worse than scum. (alt wording 34) (alt wording 86)

japanese: お前はもう死んでいる
romaji: Omae wa mou shindeiru
english: You are already dead

japanese: 諦めるという言葉は俺の辞書にない
romaji: Akirameru to iu kotoba wa ore no jisho ni nai
english: The word 'give up' isn't in my dictionary. (alt wording 50)

japanese: おれは人間を超越する！
romaji: Ore wa ningen o chouetsu suru!
english: I will transcend humanity! (alt wording 14)

japanese: 世界は残酷だ…それでも美しい
romaji: Sekai wa zankoku da... soredemo utsukushii
english: This world is cruel... yet so beautiful. (alt wording 26) (alt wording 78)

japanese: ブチャラティ、来た！
romaji: Bucharati, kita!
english: Bucciarati is here!

japanese: 貴様ッ！見ているなッ！！
romaji: Kisama! Mite iru na!!
english: You! You're watching me!

japanese: オレ様の美技にブギウギ
romaji: Ore-sama no bigi ni bugiugi
english: Dance to my beautiful technique! (alt wording 23) (alt wording 75)

japanese: お前はもう死んでいる
romaji: Omae wa mou shindeiru
english: You are already dead

japanese: 俺を誰だと思ってやがる!
romaji: Ore o dare da to omotte yagaru!
english: Who the hell do you think I am!

japanese: 俺は海賊王になる！
romaji: Ore wa kaizoku ou ni naru!
english: I'm gonna be King of the Pirates!

japanese: イエス！イエス！イエス！イエス！
romaji: Iesu! Iesu! Iesu! Iesu!
english: Yes! Yes! Yes! Yes! (alt wording 2)

japanese: 撃っていいのは撃たれる覚悟がある奴だけだ
romaji: Utte ii no wa uterareru kakugo ga aru yatsu dake da
english: Only those prepared to be shot should pull the trigger. (alt wording 45)
anime: Code Geass: Lelouch of the Rebellion

japanese: 人は忘れられた時に死ぬ。
romaji: Hito wa wasurerareta toki ni shinu.
english: A person dies when they are forgotten.

japanese: 駆逐してやる！この世から一匹残らず！
romaji: Kuchiku shite yaru! Kono yo kara ippiki nokorazu!
english: I'll exterminate them! Every last one from this world! (alt wording 36) (alt wording 88)

japanese: あきらめたらそこで試合終了ですよ…？
romaji: Akirametara soko de shiai shuuryou desu yo...?
english: If you give up, that's the end of the game.

japanese: 月に代わっておしおきよ!
romaji: Tsuki ni kawatte oshioki yo!
english: In the name of the moon, I'll punish you! (alt wording 41)

japanese: さらに向こうへ!プルスウルトラ!
romaji: Sarani mukou e! Purusu Urutora!
english: Go beyond! Plus Ultra!

japanese: レロレロレロレロ
romaji: Rero rero rero rero
english: Lero lero lero lero. (alt wording 27)

japanese: 俺は人間をやめるぞ！ジョジョーーッ！！
romaji: Ore wa ningen o yameru zo! Jojo!!
english: I'm going to stop being human, JoJo! (alt wording 12) (alt wording 64)

japanese: 仲間を大切にしない奴はそれ以上のクズだ
romaji: Nakama o taisetsu ni shinai yatsu wa sore ijou no kuzu da
english: Those who don't take care of their comrades are worse than scum. (alt wording 34) (alt wording 86)

japanese: シシシシシ
romaji: Shishishishi
english: Shishishi! (alt wording 30) (alt wording 82)
